title: Novo Nordisk's Awiqli Wins FDA Approval for Weekly Insulin
headline: Novo Nordisk receives FDA approval for Awiqli (insulin icodec), a once-weekly basal insulin, after a three-year regulatory journey.
key_facts: Awiqli (insulin icodec); once-weekly dosing; three-year wait for approval; first once-weekly basal insulin

title: Rocket Pharma's First Gene Therapy Wins FDA Approval
headline: FDA approves Rocket Pharmaceuticals' first gene therapy for an ultra-rare immune disease following years of setbacks.
key_facts: Rocket Pharmaceuticals first commercial product; ultra-rare immune disease; limited launch planned

title: Otsuka Acquires Transcend for $700M Upfront
headline: Otsuka Pharmaceutical acquires private neuropsychiatry biotech Transcend Therapeutics for $700 million upfront.
key_facts: $700 million upfront; private company; neuropsychiatry focus

title: Novartis Bets Up to $2B on Next-Gen Xolair Successor
headline: Novartis strikes a deal worth up to $2 billion with Excellergy for a next-generation allergy candidate to succeed blockbuster Xolair.
key_facts: Up to $2 billion deal value; Excellergy partnership; next-generation anti-IgE successor to Xolair; Xolair generated ~$4B+ in annual sales

title: AstraZeneca's Tozorakimab Hits Phase 3 Endpoints in COPD
headline: AstraZeneca's tozorakimab demonstrates statistically significant reductions in COPD exacerbations across two Phase 3 trials, driving ~3% premarket stock gain.
key_facts: Tozorakimab (anti-IL-33 antibody); COPD indication; two Phase III studies hit primary endpoints; statistically significant reductions in moderate-to-severe exacerbations; broader-than-expected population; AstraZeneca stock up ~3% premarket

title: AstraZeneca In Vivo CAR-T Shows Myeloma Promise, One Death
headline: AstraZeneca presents early in vivo CAR-T efficacy data in multiple myeloma but reports one patient death in China-based trial.
key_facts: In vivo CAR-T platform; multiple myeloma indication; one death reported in China trial; next-generation approach without external cell manufacturing

title: CVC Capital Bids $12.6B for Italian Pharma Recordati
headline: Private equity firm CVC Capital Partners tables a $12.6 billion offer to fully acquire Italian pharmaceutical company Recordati.
key_facts: $12.6 billion acquisition offer; CVC Capital Partners bidder; Recordati confirmed receipt of bid; Italian pharmaceutical company

title: CHMP Backs Subcutaneous Sarclisa, Four Additional Drugs
headline: European CHMP recommends approval of subcutaneous Sarclisa formulation plus four additional new medicines.
key_facts: Subcutaneous formulation of Sarclisa (isatuximab); CHMP recommendation; four additional drugs recommended
